results.title: Scaling customer engagement with conversational agents
results.content:
Most GTM training is generic. Your deals aren't.
Join Lovable and ElevenLabs and see what AI-powered role-play looks like when it's built around the unique conversations your team is actually having.
Morgan Jacobson (GTM Enablement at Lovable) & Remy Khoung (GTM Enablement at ElevenLabs) will share how they built AI-powered role-play tools that give the GTM team the practice they need -without a full L&D team, a big budget, or an engineering department.
You'll see:
- A working role-play app built in Lovable: upload a real call transcript, generate a personalized AI scenario, and run a practice conversation with a realistic ElevenLabs agent
- How ElevenLabs uses its AI agents internally to upskill its GTM team at scale [...] Join us for a webinar on how businesses are using conversational agents from ElevenLabs to scale personalized customer interactions.
We’ll show real-world deployments of AI documentation agents and AI SDRs for inbound inquiries that handle repetitive queries, reduce response times, and generate qualified leads.
The session will include:
- A 15-minute introduction to Conversational AI.
- Deep dives into two use cases: the documentation agent and the AI SDR agent.
- Best practices, integration guidance, and ROI metrics to help you evaluate business impact.
We’ll also share templates, case studies, and post-event resources to help you get started, plus opportunities to partner with providers like GCP to maximize available credits. [...] Create with the highest quality AI Audio

results.title: How to use conversational AI for better customer service
results.content:
### High-volume query handling

Order tracking, password resets, and billing questions make up the bulk of inbound volume, and each one costs your team time and effort that could be better spent on more complex issues.

How conversational AI solves it: Agents can resolve common customer queries without input from a human. That frees your team for the work that actually requires a human, such as de-escalating complaints, handling sensitive disputes, and building the kind of customer relationships that retention depends on.

Interested in seeing what it's like speaking with an ElevenAgents agent? Try the live demo below to experience a real AI conversation.

### Talk with Al, ElevenLabs's own support agent

It can help you with any questions you might have about our platform or services. [...] Faster response times. ElevenAgents' Flash models have a benchmarked latency of 75ms - meaning agents respond fast enough that the conversation feels immediate, not automated.
 24/7 coverage without 24/7 staffing. Customers who reach out after hours get a full resolution, not a voicemail or a promise to follow up in the morning.
 Consistent quality at scale. Conversational AI doesn’t have bad days, and every interaction follows your policies.
 Multilingual support. A single agent can serve customers in 70+ languages and even seamlessly switch between languages mid-conversation.
 Human agents focused on higher-value work. Routine volume gets absorbed, and complex cases get the attention they deserve. [...] How conversational AI solves it: ElevenAgents can handle 70+ languages with automatic language detection and real-time switching mid-conversation. A customer can start a conversation in English and switch to Spanish without being transferred, rerouted, or asked to start over - a level of continuity that's nearly impossible to replicate with a human team alone.

> 1,000+ calls handled by AI every day   
> Funding Societies, Southeast Asia's largest SME digital financing platform, needed to reach thousands of potential customers across five markets and multiple languages at scale. ElevenAgents now handles first contact automatically, with human agents joining only after the AI filters and qualifies the conversation.  
> - Read the full story

### Troubleshooting and technical support

results.title: ElevenLabs AI Voice Agent Review: Pricing, Features, Alternatives
results.content:
Credit consumption is faster than expected. This is the single most common complaint. One Trustpilot reviewer who upgraded all the way to the $330/month Scale plan said they could only generate “a few chapters of audio” from an audiobook before running out of credits. The same pattern shows up for voice agents – long calls drain credits quickly, and overage charges can surprise teams in their first quarter.
 Billing and refund frustrations. Several reviewers report that canceled subscriptions resulted in remaining credits being clawed back, which they describe as bad customer management. Misleading pricing perception is a recurring theme: users expect more minutes than they actually get on lower tiers. [...] In 2024 the company introduced Conversational AI – a managed platform for building voice agents that can hold real-time conversations. By 2026 this offering had evolved into “ElevenAgents,” a complete platform for deploying emotionally intelligent voice agents across phone (via Twilio and similar carriers), WhatsApp, and embedded web chat. The elevenlabs conversational AI voice agent stack is part of a broader product trifecta: ElevenAgents for conversational AI, ElevenCreative for voice and media generation, and ElevenAPI for the developer-facing infrastructure.

The pitch is simple: pair the best-sounding voices on the market with a managed conversational layer so developers can create and deploy AI agents more quickly.

### How the ElevenLabs voice agent works [...] ### Business and Enterprise plans

The Business tier costs $825/month and includes 11,000,000 credits – enough for roughly 13,750 minutes of conversation, multi-seat workspaces, and Professional Voice Cloning across the organization. Enterprise pricing is custom and adds SSO, HIPAA/BAA compliance, dedicated support, and volume discounts.

The biggest user complaint here is credit burn: agents that handle long calls or use the more expensive Multilingual v2 model can chew through quota faster than expected. Credits do roll over on paid plans, but only for two billing cycles – they don’t accumulate indefinitely. Many teams hit overage charges in their second or third month after deploying.

results.title: AI Voice Agents: ElevenLabs Review - by Lucia Franzese
results.content:
Model performance challenges: There seem to still be some issues around spoken numbers. If you’re expecting your AI Agent to whiz through many numbers, you will want to do extensive testing with the models.
 Scalability challenges: ElevenLabs built the concept of concurrency into their pricing. For the enterprise plan, you max out at 30 concurrent agents. So, for example, if you have 30 agents on the phone and one incremental call comes in, you won’t be able to answer it until the next agent is available. This may present scalability challenges, though more likely for a call center than a Sales team. [...] #### ElevenLabs Overview

First, let’s begin by discussing what ElevenLabs does. While it has a few different products, I am focused on its low‑latency, conversational agents, which have been designed to handle both inbound and outbound calls as well as text messages. It offers your pick of language(s) and accents, boasting 32 languages and 1,000+ voices as of the date of publishing. ElevenLabs leverages a simple prompt with an initial version drafted off of the main goal you outline for your AI Agent (I named mine Chip2). The prompt allows you to customize both the way the agent will behave (think tone, personality) as well as the workflow it will follow (think, step 1: initial greeting, step 2: verify the customer, and so on). [...] Therefore, ElevenLabs may not be a good fit for organizations that:

 Need to run deep analytics
 Are unwilling to give prompt engineering real resourcing
 Have a complicated product with a frequently updated knowledge base
 Are very large and might require more than 30 concurrent AI agents

I would, however, recommend this product if:

 Your sales team has a high volume of leads that you’re either not getting to today or require several SDRs to reach them
 Your team has historically not called certain leads because the expected LTV was too low
 You’re a start up getting started and you can access the product for free with the ElevenLabs grant
 You’re in a highly-regulated industry that needs to carefully mind the data privacy side
